site.title: Breakthru
site.description: Online personal training by Myer Bevan — sustainable strength and transformation.

hero.headline: Your headline here — one bold statement that captures the Breakthru transformation promise
hero.body: Two to three sentences describing who Myer coaches, what makes Breakthru different, and the outcome clients can expect — sustainable strength, confidence, and real results.
hero.trustSignal: One-line trust signal — e.g. "Trusted by athletes and beginners across 20+ countries"
hero.imageAlt: Myer Bevan — Breakthru online personal trainer

about.headline: From international footballer to transformation coach — Myer Bevan's story
paragraphs: 2–3 sentences about Myer's athletic background: his career as a professional footballer representing New Zealand internationally, what he learned about performance, body and mind at that level.
2–3 sentences describing the pivot — why he became a certified fitness coach, what drove him to help everyday people and athletes alike reach their potential through sustainable habits.
2–3 sentences on coaching philosophy: rejecting extreme measures and quick fixes in favour of strength, confidence, and lasting change. What "Breakthru" means to him and to clients.

offers.headline: The coaching approach and outcomes clients can expect
offers.body: Two sentences framing the Breakthru method: sustainable, evidence-backed, built around the individual — whether a complete beginner or a competitive athlete.

cards.title: Personalised Programming
cards.body: 2–3 sentences describing how training plans are built around the individual client's starting point, goals, schedule, and lifestyle — not a generic template.

cards.title: Mindset and Habit Coaching
cards.body: 2–3 sentences on the mindset and behaviour-change side of Breakthru — how Myer addresses confidence, consistency, and the mental side of transformation alongside the physical work.

cards.title: Strength and Body Transformation
cards.body: 2–3 sentences on the physical outcomes: building real, lasting strength, improving body composition, and developing fitness that holds up beyond the programme.

cards.title: 100% Online Delivery
cards.body: 2–3 sentences explaining the online-only model — how it works, what the client receives week to week, and why location is never a barrier to getting started.

cards.title: For All Fitness Levels
cards.body: 2–3 sentences making explicit that Breakthru is not only for advanced athletes — complete beginners are welcome and the approach scales from day one to elite marginal gains.

cards.title: No Quick Fixes
cards.body: 2–3 sentences on the Breakthru philosophy of rejecting extreme measures — why Myer coaches for sustainable long-term results rather than short-term performance that doesn't last.

testimonials.headline: Real people, real results with Breakthru
testimonials.body: One to two sentences introducing the social proof section — clients from all backgrounds and levels who broke through to their goals with Myer's coaching.

cards.quote: Client quote — one sentence describing their experience and result with Breakthru. Make it specific to the transformation achieved.

services.headline: Choose the programme that fits your life
services.body: Every Breakthru programme is built around you — your schedule, your goals, your starting point. Pick your level and let's get to work.
services.reassurance: Not sure which is right for you? The application form helps Myer recommend the best fit.

tiers.title: Self-Guided Plan
tiers.description: 1–2 sentences describing this entry-level option: a personalised programme delivered to the client's app, with check-ins to track progress.

tiers.title: 1-on-1 Coaching
tiers.description: 1–2 sentences describing this core offering: full access to Myer, weekly check-ins, real-time adjustments, and everything in Foundation.

tiers.title: Performance & Athletes
tiers.description: 1–2 sentences describing the premium athlete-focused tier: sport-specific conditioning, periodisation, and high-frequency coaching access.

form.headline: Is Breakthru right for you?
form.body: Two sentences explaining the purpose of this form: Myer reviews every application personally and only takes on clients he knows he can help achieve a genuine transformation.
form.responseNote: Myer reviews every application personally. You will hear back within 48 hours.

footer.tagline: Online personal training by Myer Bevan — former NZ international footballer
